name: 适应性回应与韧性
description: 用于说明家庭、关系或行动者如何回应冲击、健康下降、责任变化或制度压力。

clusters.meaning: 家庭或关系对冲击与需求变化的适应性回应

expressions.note: 适合报告机制不被触发，语气比 no effect 更过程化。
expressions.example: Family ties were unresponsive to mental health declines.

expressions.note: 比 resilience alone 更强调有选择、有功能的关系调整。
expressions.example: Families employ strategic family resilience after health declines.

expressions.note: 适合解释为什么关系或资源配置会调整。
expressions.example: Families adapt to changing family demands.

expressions.note: following 可自然引出前后变化，不必写 after only。
expressions.example: Relationships changed following older parents' health declines.

expressions.en: in response to changing family demands
expressions.note: 比 because family demands change 更凝练，适合适应性机制。
expressions.example: Relationships shift in response to changing family demands.
